positional_bias.note: Cycle-1 meta_gift_desync resolved: q6 MCQ (LO6) added to quiz.gift; q7 short-answer renumbered. Final distribution [0,1,2,3,2,0] max_share=33.3% < 40% threshold. All 4 positions used.

length_bias.note: 1/6 MCQs (q6) correct answer slightly longer than mean — 16.7% well below 40% fail threshold. Non-blocking.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors represent plausible beginner misconceptions. Soft notes on q4 ('model refuses') and q5 ('grammar checker') from cycle 1 non-blocking.

objective_coverage.note: Cycle-1 LO6 gap closed: q6 MCQ added testing 'tool use turns standalone LLM into capable assistant'.

beginner_fairness.note: All stems plain language. LLM spelled out in q4. All 7 questions on this topic only.

auto_correction_applied.note: Cycle-1 failed: LO6 uncovered + GIFT/sidecar desync (5 MCQs in gift vs 6 in sidecar). Fix: added q6 MCQ for LO6 (correct at pos 0) to quiz.gift; renamed short-answer to q7; updated sidecar. All checks pass cycle 2.

verdict: PASSED (cycle 2). LO6 MCQ added; GIFT/sidecar synced to 6 MCQ + 1 SA = 7 questions. Positional distribution [0,1,2,3,2,0] max_share=33.3%. All 6 LOs covered. All bias checks pass.
